properties.name: io.github.sanwenyukaochi.cloudflare.turnstile.connect-timeout
properties.description: Connection timeout in seconds for Turnstile API calls.

properties.name: io.github.sanwenyukaochi.cloudflare.turnstile.read-timeout
properties.description: Read timeout in seconds for Turnstile API calls.

properties.name: io.github.sanwenyukaochi.cloudflare.turnstile.metrics.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable Turnstile metrics collection with Micrometer.

properties.name: io.github.sanwenyukaochi.cloudflare.turnstile.metrics.health-check-enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable Turnstile health check endpoint.

properties.name: io.github.sanwenyukaochi.cloudflare.turnstile.metrics.error-threshold
properties.description: Threshold for error rate percentage that triggers health status degradation.

properties.name: io.github.sanwenyukaochi.cloudflare.turnstile.login.submission-path
properties.description: Path to intercept for login submissions when using TurnstileCaptchaFilter.

properties.name: io.github.sanwenyukaochi.cloudflare.turnstile.login.redirect-url
properties.description: URL to redirect to when captcha validation fails.

properties.name: io.github.sanwenyukaochi.cloudflare.turnstile.token.parameter-name
properties.description: Name of the request parameter containing the Turnstile token.
